name: Griha Pravesh Pooja
description: Bless your new home before you move a single box in. Vedic rites to welcome prosperity and peace into every room.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 11l9-7 9 7"/><path d="M5 10v9a1 1 0 001 1h4v-6h4v6h4a1 1 0 001-1v-9"/></svg>

name: Satyanarayan Katha
description: A gentle evening of katha and prasad — for gratitude, new beginnings, or simply because it's time.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 6c-2-1.5-5-2-8-1v13c3-1 6-.5 8 1 2-1.5 5-2 8-1V5c-3-1-6-.5-8 1z"/><path d="M12 6v14"/></svg>

name: Ganesh Pooja
description: Clear the path before you start anything that matters — a business, a journey, a big decision.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M5 18a7 7 0 0114 0"/><line x1="2" y1="18" x2="22" y2="18"/><line x1="12" y1="7" x2="12" y2="3"/><line x1="6" y1="9" x2="4" y2="7"/><line x1="18" y1="9" x2="20" y2="7"/></svg>

name: Rudra Abhishek
description: A powerful Shiv ritual of milk, water, and mantra — offered for strength through a hard season.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 3c4 5 6.5 8.2 6.5 11.2A6.5 6.5 0 015.5 14.2C5.5 11.2 8 8 12 3z"/></svg>

name: Navratri / Durga Pooja
description: Nine nights, one devotion. We help you host the full vidhi or a single evening's aarti.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 3l1.2 3.6L17 8l-3.8 1.4L12 13l-1.2-3.6L7 8l3.8-1.4z"/><circle cx="18" cy="16" r="1.6"/><circle cx="6" cy="17" r="1.4"/></svg>

name: Namkaran Sanskar
description: The ceremony where your child receives their name — small, personal, and unforgettable.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 21V10"/><path d="M12 10c0-3.5-2.5-6-6-6 0 3.5 2.5 6 6 6z"/><path d="M12 13c0-3.5 2.5-6 6-6 0 3.5-2.5 6-6 6z"/></svg>

name: Graha Shanti
description: For the phases astrology warns about — a calm, structured ritual to steady what feels shaky.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M20 14.5A8 8 0 119.5 4a6.5 6.5 0 1010.5 10.5z"/><path d="M18 3l.6 1.6L20 5l-1.4.6L18 7l-.6-1.4L16 5l1.4-.4z"/></svg>

name: Office / Shop Opening Pooja
description: Open your doors the right way — a short, focused pooja before the first customer walks in.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="7" cy="12" r="3.2"/><path d="M10 12h11M17 12v3M20 12v3"/></svg>
